rulings.Case Title: OGBAI KIDANE et al VS. HENOK ARAYA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Petition And Motion; Petition To Compel Arbitration And Mtn To Stay Action; Memo Of P And A; Declaration; Pos
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, October 27, 2008, line 4. DEFENDANT HENOK ARAYA'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Action is denied. Defendant has failed to show a valid arbitration agreement with most plaintiffs and as to those plaintiffs for which he has shown an agreement, he has waived any right he had to arbitrate. =(302/HEK/JW)
